entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for pest resistance

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Atherigona soccata

entities.name: STEM BORER
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Chibparte Uns

entities.name: ARMY WORM
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Mythimna separata

entities.name: APHIDS
entities.description: Major pests of sorghum, including Rhopalosiphum maidis and Melanaphis sacchari

entities.name: SHOOT BUG
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Peregrinus maidis

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Stenodiplosis sorghicola

entities.name: HEAD BUG
entities.description: A major pest of sorghum, scientifically known as Calocoris angustatus

entities.name: HEAD CATERPILLARS
entities.description: Major pests of sorghum, including Helicoverpa armigera, Cryptoblabes gnidiella, and Eumlemma silicula

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the host plant to resist pests like shoot fly and stem borer

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The region where these pests are majorly reported
